title: campanula rotundifolia subsp. linifolia
intro: Campanula rotundifolia subsp. linifolia, also known as the bellflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the bellflower family. It is primarily found in Europe, particularly in mountainous regions. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Campanula rotundifolia subsp. linifolia can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues including digestive problems and skin irritations, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing.
